raw.summary: The code does not read PLUGIN_PATH from environment variable as required; it reads from command-line argument instead. Additionally, the path validation is insufficient: os.path.abspath does not resolve symlinks, so a symlink inside /opt/mytool/plugins pointing outside would bypass the check. The code also uses the deprecated imp module (which may not exist in Python 3.4+) and uses imp.load_module unsafely without proper file extension handling. The code does not handle the case where PLUGIN_PATH is unset.
